verses.text: Topa leh Israel a kitotna ngai un. Topa aw, kipan in la, mual liante leh mual neute mai-ah na thu sung in
No mual liante leh a kip tawntung leitung bulpite aw, Topa' thu ngai un. Topa in ama mite tawh thu nei a, Israel tawh thu kisel ding hi
Topa in hih bangin thu sung a, “Ka mite aw, note bang hong cihkha ka hi hiam? Tu-in hong dawng dih un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih a, salsuahna panin ka hong honkhia hi. Note a hong makai dingin Moses, Aaron, leh Miriam ka hong sawl hi

Ka mite aw, Moab Kumpi Balak in note sukna ding a vaihawmna teng, Beor' tapa Balaam in ama nget bangin a sepna teng limtakin phawkkik un. Note hotkhiatna dingin ka sepna thu na theihna dingun Shittim leh Gilgal kikala thupiangte ngaihsun kik un,” a ci hi.
Vantung Pasian, Topa biakna dingin bang va keng ding ka hi hiam? Amah biakna-in hal dingin bawngno thaute va paipih ding ka hi hiam
Topa kiangah tuu a tul tulin va puakin, guntui bangin sathau va luangsak leng, tuate tawh amah lungdam ding ahi hiam? Ka mawhnate maisakna dingin ka ta upa pen tawh va bia ding ka hi hiam

Mun khempeuhah a om no mihingte aw, Topa in a hoih nate hong gen khinzo hi. Topa in note tung panin hong kalh thu in: Thuman thutang sem ding a, itna kip nei tawntungin, kiniamkhiatna tawh Pasian' thu man' ding ahi hi
Topa, zahtak ding kilawm hi. Khuasungah amah hong kiko a, “Ngai un, khuapi sungah a hong kikhawm mite aw
Thumanlopi-in a ngah uh, migilote' innsunga van omte, keima deihloh tawitehna manlo zatnate, mangngilh thei ding ka hi hiam
Tawikhaina manlo leh tawisuang manlo a zangte, khahkhong ding ka hi hiam
Na mihaute uh mizawngte tungah tatsia mahmahin, na khuasung mi khempeuh uh zuaugen vive ahi uh a, a kam un khemna thu bekbek gen hi
Tua ahih ciangin na mawhna hangun note suksiat ding ka kipan ta hi
An na nek hangun na kham kei ding uh a, na gil uh kiallai veve ding hi. Na na koihcing uh hangin phatuamlo ding hi. Galte in tua na koihcing uh nate susia veve ding hi
Khai na tuh uh hangin an na la kei ding uh hi. Oliv gah na cil uh hangin a thau na zangkha kei ding uh a, leenggah na cil uh hangin a zu na dawnkha kei ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Omri' gamtatna zui-in, ama tapa Kumpi Ahab' sep khempeuh na sem uh a, amau' gamtat khempeuh na zui uh hi. Tua ahih manin note kong susia ding hi. Minam dangte in note hong nuihsanin, amaute' simmnawhna na thuak ding uh hi.
